data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Options are minimized to reduce decision-making time for the user.

data.title: Fitts' Law
data.description: UI elements are optimized for quicker access and navigation.

data.title: Consistency Principle
data.description: Uniform design elements across the platform for better user comprehension.

data.title: Feedback Principle
data.description: Users receive immediate feedback on interactions to confirm actions.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Visually appealing interfaces perceived as easier to use.
